boundaries: Research-only static analysis. Not investment advice. This tool does not fetch live data, connect to brokers, place orders, recommend buys, sells, holds, target allocations, or trades, predict returns, or produce personalized financial advice.
safety_notes: Run local static commands only; no network access or broker connection is part of the walkthrough.
Do not add live market data, broker actions, trading recommendations, or personalized advice.
Treat review-ledger blockers as release blockers until the input text is revised.

steps.expected_result: Markdown and JSON command matrix are written under demo/.
steps.title: Inspect available commands

steps.expected_result: A neutral thesis packet is written as Markdown and JSON.
steps.title: Build the packet from static examples

steps.expected_result: A review ledger flags low-confidence or advice-like input text.
steps.title: Review evidence safety

steps.expected_result: Synthetic sensitivity and exposure maps are written as Markdown and JSON.
steps.title: Render static sensitivity and exposure layers

steps.command: macro-policy-thesis-map adoption-notes && macro-policy-thesis-map reviewer-scorecard && macro-policy-thesis-map release-deck
steps.expected_result: Release-owner notes, scorecard, and deck are written as Markdown and JSON.
steps.title: Read release-owner promotion notes

steps.expected_result: A deterministic bundle manifest is written under demo/bundle_export/.
steps.title: Export the public promotion bundle manifest

steps.expected_result: A public readiness report lists pass/fail gates.
steps.title: Check public readiness

steps.command: macro-policy-thesis-map selfcheck && macro-policy-thesis-map public-scan && macro-policy-thesis-map diff-check
steps.expected_result: All commands exit successfully before sharing artifacts.
steps.title: Run final local checks
